findings.title: Pipe to interpreter: curl | python3
findings.description:
Command pipes output from 'curl' directly to interpreter 'python3'. Downloaded content will be executed without inspection.
  Safer: tirith run https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=autonomous+ai+agent+language:python&sort=stars&order=desc  — or: vet https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=autonomous+ai+agent+language:python&sort=stars&order=desc  (https://getvet.sh)

evidence.matched: curl -s https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=autonomous+ai+agent+language:python&sort=[REDACTED]&order=[REDACTED] | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=[REDACTED]; [print(f\"{r['name']}: {r['html_url']} (⭐{r['stargazers_count']})\") for r in d.get('items',[])[:5]]"
